messages.content: What is the water-to-medicine mixing ratio for this?
45 Cyflumetofen·Etoxazole: 15 grams mixed with 30 jin of water; Got it, dear customer~
MaiZhi Spider, how much water per mu for 50 jin?

Spider No.1: Dear customer, here is the usage guide for you~ Every bottle of 500g Spider No.1 comes with a free bottle of Bifenazate·Etoxazole, 500ml mixed with 300 jin of water, that's one full bottle~ Then add the free gift Bifenyl Etoxazole in as well, spray on the crop leaf surface, 500g of this product supports spraying one mu of land~ 100g requires you to prepare your own small pesticide
So one set of 100g plus 100g covers one mu of land?
Hello, yes it does; 500g covers one mu, dear customer
How many jin can 500ml be mixed with?
Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; 29% Bisultap: 1g mixed with 2 jin of water
How to use it?
Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; 29% Bisultap: 1g mixed with 2 jin of water
How much medicine for 30 jin of water?
Hello, yes I'm here; 45 Cyflumetofen·Etoxazole: 15 grams mixed with 30 jin of water
How do I use this please?

Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; 1g mixed with 1 jin of water, spray on leaf surface, use once every 5 days or so, increase the amount based on field size, 500g per mu, improvement will appear after 3-4 application cycles
How much water does one bottle of this fungicide mix with?
Hello, yes I'm here; 50 jin, dear; Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything!

Is this an insecticide or an adjuvant?

Hello, yes I'm here; This is an adjuvant, dear. Its function is "auxiliary" — it needs to be used together with pesticides. It helps the active ingredients of the pesticide adhere better to the crop surface, penetrate into the leaves, and disperse evenly in the liquid, or it reduces liquid runoff and evaporation, thereby improving the efficacy, stability, and ease of use of the pesticide.

Dear, here is the product instruction manual, please take a look~ Feel free to contact me anytime if there is anything you don't understand~
